title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: kmod-amdgpu bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for kmod-amdgpu is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: This package provides a kernel module for AMD GPUs that contains the latest changes backported from the upstream Linux kernel.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Please consider including kmod-amdgpu in RHEL 10.1 Extensions (JIRA:RHEL-132183)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
full_text:
An update for kmod-amdgpu is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

This package provides a kernel module for AMD GPUs that contains the latest changes backported from the upstream Linux kernel.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Please consider including kmod-amdgpu in RHEL 10.1 Extensions (JIRA:RHEL-132183)
